Property.Name: CreatedByUser
Property.sap:label: Created By
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Person Responsible for Creating the Object

Property.Name: LastChangeDateTime
Property.sap:label: Time Stamp
Property.sap:quickinfo: UTC Time Stamp in Long Form (YYYYMMDDhhmmssmmmuuun)

Property.Name: BillingDocCombinationCriteria
Property.sap:label: Combination Criteria
Property.sap:quickinfo: Combination criteria in the billing document

Property.Name: VATRegistrationCountry
Property.sap:label: Ctry/Rgn Sls Tax No.
Property.sap:quickinfo: Country/Region of Sales Tax ID Number

Property.Name: IsEUTriangularDeal
Property.sap:label: EU Triangular Deal
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Triangular Deal Within the EU

Property.Name: SEPAMandate
Property.sap:label: Mandate Reference
Property.sap:quickinfo: Unique Reference to Mandate for each Payee

Property.Name: DeviatingPostingDate
Property.sap:label: Dev. Posting Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Deviating Posting Date for Financial Accounting

Property.Name: AccountingDocument
Property.sap:label: Document Number
Property.sap:quickinfo: Document Number of an Accounting Document

Property.Name: ReversalReason
Property.sap:label: Reversal Reason
Property.sap:quickinfo: Reason for Reversal or Inverse Posting

Property.Name: InternalFinancialDocument
Property.sap:label: Financial Doc. No.
Property.sap:quickinfo: Financial doc. processing: Internal financial doc. number

Property.Name: CreditControlArea_Text
Property.sap:quickinfo: Description of the credit control area

Property.Name: InvoiceListStatus
Property.sap:label: Invoice List Status
Property.sap:quickinfo: Invoice list status of billing document

Property.Name: InvoiceListBillingDate
Property.sap:label: Inv. List Bill. Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Billing date for the invoice list

Property.Name: CompanyCodeName
Property.sap:label: Company Name
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Company Code or Company

Property.Name: CreditControlArea_Text
Property.sap:quickinfo: Description of the credit control area

Property.Name: NonTaxableTransactionTaxCode
Property.sap:label: Output Tax Code
Property.sap:quickinfo: Output Tax Code for Non-Taxable Transactions

Property.Name: DocDateIsUsedForTaxDetn
Property.sap:label: Tax Determ.with Doc.Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Document Date As the Basis for Tax Determination

Property.Name: TaxRptgDateIsActive
Property.sap:label: Tax Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Tax Reporting Date Active in Documents

Property.Name: CashDiscountBaseAmtIsNetAmt
Property.sap:label: Net Discount Base
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Discount base amount is the net value

Property.Name: CompanyCodeName
Property.sap:label: Company Name
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Company Code or Company

Property.Name: CountryChartOfAccounts
Property.sap:label: Alternative Chart of Accounts
Property.sap:quickinfo: Alternative Chart of Accounts for Country/Region

Property.Name: CreatedByUser
Property.sap:label: Created by
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Person who Created the Object

Property.Name: DeliveryIsBlocked
Property.sap:label: Delivery block
Property.sap:quickinfo: Central delivery block for the customer

Property.Name: IsOneTimeAccount
Property.sap:label: One-Time Account
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Is the Account a One-Time Account?

Property.Name: AlternativePayerAccount
Property.sap:label: Alternative Payer
Property.sap:quickinfo: Account Number of an Alternative Payer

Property.Name: DataMediumExchangeIndicator
Property.sap:label: DME Recipient Code
Property.sap:quickinfo: Recipient Code for Data Medium Exchange

Property.Name: FiscalAddress
Property.sap:label: Fiscal address
Property.sap:quickinfo: Account number of the master record with the fiscal address

Property.Name: DeletionIndicator
Property.sap:label: Deletion Flag
Property.sap:quickinfo: Central Deletion Flag for Master Record

Property.Name: InternationalLocationNumber3
Property.sap:label: Check digit
Property.sap:quickinfo: Check digit for the international location number

Property.Name: AlternativePayeeIsAllowed
Property.sap:label: Alt.payer in doc?
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator: Is an alternative payer allowed in document?

Property.Name: POBoxDeviatingCityName
Property.sap:label: Business Partner Address - PO Box Deviating City

Property.Name: CompleteDeliveryIsDefined
Property.sap:label: Complete Delivery
Property.sap:quickinfo: Complete Delivery Defined for Each Sales Order

Property.Name: BillingIsBlockedForCustomer
Property.sap:label: BBlock for SlsA
Property.sap:quickinfo: Billing block for customer (sales and distribution)

Property.Name: AccountByCustomer
Property.sap:label: Account at Customer
Property.sap:quickinfo: Shipper's (Our) Account Number at the Customer or Vendor

Property.Name: CustomerPricingProcedure
Property.sap:quickinfo: Customer Classification for Pricing Procedure Determination

Property.Name: MaxNmbrOfPartialDelivery
Property.sap:quickinfo: Maximum Number of Partial Deliveries Allowed Per Item

Property.Name: IsMarkedForArchiving
Property.sap:label: Archiving Flag
Property.sap:quickinfo: Central archiving marker for master record

Property.Name: CreatedByUser
Property.sap:label: Created By
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Person Responsible for Creating the Object

Property.Name: AccountingDocument
Property.sap:label: Document Number
Property.sap:quickinfo: Document Number of an Accounting Document

Annotation.String: Setting the text direction-layout is supported
PDF supports setting the text direction-layout (e.g. left-to-right or right-to-left) in the document description
